body:
This PR adds a bunch of examples, tests them, and writes them so that `Literate.jl` can be used to generate markdown files from them. 

In the future, we can add these markdown files to the documentation.

Examples that might be good to add to ~~this~~ a future PR:

- 2D convection into a stratified fluid with "phytoplankton-like" tracer: demonstrates forcing functions, nice boundary conditions, etc
- 2D Kelvin-Helmholtz instability: just a simple but interesting stratified example
- Stratified Couette flow example: nice 3D example with `Value` boundary conditions

Also: 

- [x] Clean up and simplify deepening mixed layer example: should become a good 3D example; perhaps merge into single 'case' including forcing by both wind and unstable buoyancy forcing
title: Examples: more, better, tested
